center.name: 吉仙國家公園
center.summary: 吉仙國家公園是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括眼斑孔雀雉，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the seasonal tropical forests of mid-southern Vietnam and far eastern Cambodia; it can be found readily in Cat Tien National Park

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in the seasonal tropical forests of mid-southern Vietnam and far eastern Cambodia; it can be found readily in Cat Tien National Park
